name: PullToRefresh

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The scrollable content wrapped by the pull-to-refresh gesture. The root element itself is the scroll container (overflow-y: auto).

parameters.name: OnRefresh
parameters.description: Invoked when the user releases a pull past ThresholdPx. The spinner stays locked visible until the returned task completes.

parameters.name: ThresholdPx
parameters.description: Pull distance (in pixels, post rubber-band) required on release to trigger OnRefresh. Defaults to 80.

parameters.name: MaxPullPx
parameters.description: Maximum visual pull distance in pixels; the rubber-banded offset is clamped to this. Defaults to 120.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root scroll-container element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root scroll-container element.

events.name: OnRefresh
events.description: Invoked when the user releases a pull past ThresholdPx. The spinner stays locked visible until the returned task completes.

examples.title: Basic Pull to Refresh
examples.code:
Pull down to refresh · Count: @_refreshCount
Item 1
Item 2
@code { private int _refreshCount; private async Task HandleRefresh() { await Task.Delay(1000); _refreshCount++; } }

examples.title: Custom Threshold and Max Pull
examples.code:
Triggers after only 50 px of pull
Row 1
Row 2

examples.title: Async data refresh
examples.code:
@foreach (var item in _feed) {
@item
} @code { private int _seq = 3; private List _feed = new() { "Update #3", "Update #2", "Update #1" }; private async Task LoadNewer() { await Task.Delay(900); _feed.Insert(0, $"Update #{++_seq}"); } }

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The scrollable content wrapped by the pull-to-refresh gesture. The root element itself is the scroll container (overflow-y: auto).

mdSummary:
# PullToRefresh

Pull To Refresh component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pull-to-refresh

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PullToRefresh | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The scrollable content wrapped by the pull-to-refresh gesture. The root element itself is the scroll container (overflow-y: auto). |
| PullToRefresh | OnRefresh | `EventCallback` | `` | Invoked when the user releases a pull past ThresholdPx. The spinner stays locked visible until the returned task completes. |
| PullToRefresh | ThresholdPx | `double` | `80` | Pull distance (in pixels, post rubber-band) required on release to trigger OnRefresh. Defaults to 80. |
| PullToRefresh | MaxPullPx | `double` | `120` | Maximum visual pull distance in pixels; the rubber-banded offset is clamped to this. Defaults to 120. |
| PullToRefresh | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root scroll-container element. |
| PullToRefresh | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root scroll-container element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (PullToRefresh) — The scrollable content wrapped by the pull-to-refresh gesture. The root element itself is the scroll container (overflow-y: auto).

## Events
- `OnRefresh` (`EventCallback`) — Invoked when the user releases a pull past ThresholdPx. The spinner stays locked visible until the returned task completes.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<PullToRefresh />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/PullToRefresh/PullToRefresh.razor`
